purpose: Based on scan results, recover governed external content into the managed templates, create any missing managed directories, and sync mirror plus installed skill assets.
instruction: collect recovers only Part A from external AGENTS targets
collect may create missing managed directory structure from the scan result
collect updates only the internal human template Part A
collect must not overwrite the internal Part B
workflow: open an external managed AGENTS file
replace only the internal human template Part A block
rules: machine json is not collected from external files
Part B stays skill-internal during collect
collect must sync the same managed result into mirror and installed skill directories
